title: [SQL] count(*) with order by and limit crashes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'test2', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 5;
SELECT COUNT(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 3;
key_bug_features: count(*) with order by and limit
